TextView.android:text:
Report on Progress

1.Track Your Workouts
Keep a record of exercises done each day to see improvement over time.

2.Monitor Weight and Measurements
Regularly check weight or body measurements to track physical changes.

3.Note Energy Levels
Record how energetic or tired you feel after workouts and throughout the day.

4.Check Strength Gains
Track improvements in strength like lifting heavier weights or doing more repetitions.

5.Log Your Food Intake
Keep a simple diary of meals to see if nutrition is balanced.

6.Reflect on Goals
Compare current progress with initial goals and adjust if needed.

7.Celebrate Small Wins
Recognize and reward small achievements to stay motivated.

8.Consistency is Key
Regular tracking helps maintain consistency and improve overall health.
